item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1min Super knock from Harman but going to need Straka to find his putter to have two in the mi
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1min Super knock from Harman but going to need Straka to find his putter to have two in the mix. Would be nice if less was 14, fear 15 or 16. 98

item.title: PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 4min A lot of names at the top of the leaderboard right now 2 4 18 5 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 18min At 13-under, Brian Harman moves into the clubhouse lead at the RBC Heritag
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 18min At 13-under, Brian Harman moves into the clubhouse lead at the RBC Heritage following a third-round 8-under 63, his best score in 59 rounds at the event. 2 15 3 mil

item.title:

A Saturday 63 moves him up into a tie for the le
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 20min Career low for Brian Harman at Harbour Town!
A Saturday 63 moves him up into a tie for the lead @RBC_Heritage . 3 8 67 18 mil

item.title:
